import axios from'axios';const API=axios.create({baseURL:'http://localhost:5000/api'});// Attach JWT token to every request if available
API.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('authToken');if(token){config.headers.Authorization=`Bearer ${token}`;}return config;});// ─── Product APIs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const fetchProducts=params=>API.get('/products',{params});export const fetchProduct=id=>API.get(`/products/${id}`);export const createProduct=data=>API.post('/products',data,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});export const updateProduct=(id,data)=>API.put(`/products/${id}`,data,{headers:{'Content-Type':'multipart/form-data'}});export const deleteProduct=id=>API.delete(`/products/${id}`);// ─── Sales APIs ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const fetchSales=()=>API.get('/sales');export const addSale=data=>API.post('/sales',data);// ─── Purchase APIs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const fetchPurchases=()=>API.get('/purchase');export const addPurchase=data=>API.post('/purchase',data);// ─── Auth APIs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export const login=data=>API.post('/auth/login',data);export const register=data=>API.post('/auth/register',data);export default API;
